name: Tomato Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Chuck or rump (Elk or Deer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat slowly in margarine or butter.
2. When well browned, add tomato juice, salt, and garlic.
3. Cover lightly and simmer until tender, about 3 1/2 hours.
4. Add potatoes and carrots about 45 minutes before the meat is done.
